current_arc.headline: Support tickets are widening faster than onboarding can absorb.

watch_items: Trust is slipping among larger accounts.
Runway is below the healthy expansion band.
A rival just gained momentum in enterprise.

startup.thesis: Win mid-market support teams with reliable AI triage and fast onboarding.
startup.last_turn_summary: You pushed growth last turn and the user base expanded, but support backlog widened.
private_notes: A growth-first plan is only safe if backlog stops widening in the next two turns.

rivals.headline: Still leading on growth, but board pressure is rising.
Runway is weak and the team is getting noisy.
